name: MSI A320M-A PRO Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD A320 Chipset - Supports DDR4-3200(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 2.0 x1 - HDMI 1.4 - DVI-D - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN (A320MAPRO)
shortName: MSI A320M-A PRO Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD A320 Chipset
description: Budget-friendly micro ATX motherboard with dual display outputs for entry-level AM4 systems.
